title: Loukoumades with Honey Syrup
description: A classic Greek dessert made with honey syrup and crispy fried dough balls. Serve warm and enjoy!
instructions: Combine honey, sugar, and 1 cup of water in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Combine flour and salt in a large bowl.
Make a well in the center and add the yogurt, eggs, and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Cover with plastic wrap and let rest for 1 hour.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F.
Fry the dough in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
